prompt: Assess lifecycle state, percent complete, defects, and remaining work.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is S-201 Rebar placement within 2.4 Structural & Ironwork. The relevant subcategory is 2.4.2 Reinforcing. title: T2 S-201 Progress assessment
